emails.subject: JOSE LNG Project Update
emails.body: JOSE LNG Project Update Mike, Attached is a brief update of the most significant events in the last two weeks for the Jose LNG Project. I will continue to update the team on a weekly basis before each Monday morning. Emilio

emails.subject: Re: JOSE LNG Project Update
emails.body: Re: JOSE LNG Project Update Emilo, Thanks for the information. Let me know if there is anything else I can do. I know that Neal Gerstandt just joined the company last week and will be working with you on project Jose. You will find him to be a great guy and a person with excellent judgment and overall experience in the energy industry. I have known and worked with Neal for over 10 years. I think he will make a great addition to the team and help bring this deal home.... the largest deal at Enron. Mike
